article.p: MetaOWL provides useForm() — a declarative hook for building validated forms with async submission support.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
<templates> <t t-name="LoginPage"> <form t-on-submit.prevent="form.submit"> <input t-model="form.values.email" type="email" placeholder="E-Mail" /> <span t-if="form.errors.email" t-esc="form.errors.email" class="error"/>
<input t-model="form.values.password" type="password" placeholder="Password" /> <span t-if="form.errors.password" t-esc="form.errors.password" class="error"/>
<button type="submit" t-att-disabled="form.isSubmitting"> <t t-if="form.isSubmitting">Loading...</t> <t t-else="">Login</t> </button> </form> </t> </templates>

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Each field in the schema supports the following validation rules:

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: useForm() returns a reactive form instance with the following properties and methods:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
// Reactive state form.values // Current field values form.errors // Validation errors by field form.touched // Fields the user has interacted with form.isSubmitting // true while onSubmit is running form.isValid // true if all validation passes form.isDirty // true if values differ from initialValues
// Methods form.submit() // Trigger validation + onSubmit form.setValue('field', value) // Update a single field form.setValues({ ... }) // Update multiple fields form.setError('field', 'msg') // Manually set an error form.clearErrors() // Clear all errors form.reset() // Reset to initialValues form.validate() // Run validation without submitting

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
